name: Step 6 — SRD lookup via LLM tool calls
description: Verify the DM can look up real SRD data during chat instead of hallucinating stats.

steps.message: Silas flips through his spellbook. Can you remind me what Fireball does exactly?
What about the Shield spell? I want to make sure I have it prepared.
What kind of creatures might we run into in an underground tomb? Anything around CR 2 or lower?
